textRuns.value: Sections:  ▶ Active Development = resourced, with timelines  |  ○ Pipeline = accepted, awaiting resources  |  ● Production = delivered, in operation       Lifecycle:  Intake [1/4] → Discovery [2/4] → Development [3/4] → UAT [4/4] → Production       Service Categories:  Process Modernization | Analytics Innovation | Data Enablement
